displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
You’re out. You’re on the go and most importantly, you’re busy. Whether you’ve missed the bus, got caught in the pouring rain or your day is just going from bad to worse Snickers snack bars will sort you out.

Active lifestyle? Reach for Snickers to help keep you going, wherever you’re going. Whether you’re halfway up a mountain or at half-time during your weekly five-a-side match.

Don’t lose steam when the clock is running out. Share a fun size Snickers Bar before the game and leave hunger on the sidelines.

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Skimmed Milk Powder, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Sunflower Oil, Milk Fat, Lactose and Protein From Whey (from Milk), Whey Powder (from Milk), Palm Fat, Fat Reduced Cocoa, Barley Malt Extract, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin), Salt, Egg White Powder, Milk Protein, Natural Vanilla Extract
• Contains lactose, milk, barley, soya, egg
• May contain peanut
metaData.Key Information: A delicious and indulgent treat that can be enjoyed occasionally as part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.
